# AI Injection Prompt Vault

> A paid library of 5,909 AI prompts (3,814 with preview images) for image, video, influencer and content generation. One-time £24.99. Buy: https://aiinjectionvault.com

## Free samples
- [Free AI prompt examples — sample hub](https://ainjection.github.io/prompts/sample/): 204 complete sample prompts across 34 collections, shown in full. The full library of 5,909 prompts is paid (£24.99 one-time) at https://aiinjectionvault.com
